title: sagina procumbens
intro: Sagina procumbens, also known as procumbent pearlwort, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic and its anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of sagina procumbens include its potential to help with urinary issues, such as kidney stones and bladder problems, as well as its ability to reduce swelling and ease pain. Herbal preparations of sagina procumbens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support urinary health and alleviate various health complaints.
